calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff , Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Fred Doughty.
Attorney, John P Zanghi is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Ronald E. Lee is present.
Attorney, Erin Katayama is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jon Polland, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of December 16, 2013 is vacated.
